details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors before any invoice email can be sent.
details.mustRemainUnsupportedUntilModeled: This root can send merchant/customer email, so it should not be treated as a simple local state transition. Happy-path capture requires a disposable order and safe recipient/mailbox controls.

notes: Planned invoice-send parity and side-effect-safety scenario for `orderInvoiceSend`. This root is not locally supported yet and must remain an explicit unsupported passthrough until a no-surprise local side-effect model is designed from safe live evidence.
